ocr_findings.description: OCR line 5 contains '^{}[]' — a garbage artifact likely generated from the decorative chapter-opener graphic element (stop-sign triangle illustration or surrounding ornamental marks). This string does not appear in the image and pollutes the OCR output.

OCR inserts a spurious heading '# 企業法務' and '## 会社が守るべきルール' structure not present as explicit headings on the image page — the image shows '会社が守るべきルール' as caption text inside the callout box, not as a standalone markdown heading. Minor structural inflation.

reviewer_notes: Page is the Lesson 02-05 opener for その他の法律 with chapter illustration, intro paragraph, コンプライアンス definition, and pyramid diagram (法令/社内ルール/企業倫理). Body text is faithfully transcribed. Two findings: a garbage artifact from the decorative graphic (med) and slight over-structuring of headings (low). Diagram pyramid content is captured in the caption text.
